projects.title: Predictive Maintenance SaaS Foundation
projects.summary: Architect a multi-tenant industrial monitoring platform utilizing Next.js for the frontend and AWS Cognito for rigorous identity isolation between manufacturing plants. Integrate Stripe for complex usage-based billing models tied to sensor throughput, and leverage Amazon Bedrock to generate predictive maintenance advisories from raw telemetry patterns while maintaining strict data residency.
outcomes: Multi-tenant authentication with hierarchical RBAC in Cognito
Usage-based billing pipeline utilizing Stripe Metered Billing
Real-time sensor telemetry dashboard with Next.js Server Components
Automated maintenance schedule generation via Bedrock Claude 3
learningPoints: Advanced data partitioning strategies for tenant isolation
Implementing idempotent billing webhooks at scale
Context-aware prompt engineering for technical advisories
Next.js App Router patterns for high-throughput data

projects.title: Global IIoT Edge Gateway
projects.summary: Deploy a low-latency edge gateway for global manufacturing sites to report telemetry with sub-50ms response times. Utilize Lambda@Edge for request validation and DynamoDB Global Tables to ensure eventual consistency across regional command centers, managed by Route 53 latency-based routing.
outcomes: Global API endpoint with sub-100ms P99 latency
Multi-region active-active DynamoDB replication
Edge-side request authorization and schema validation
Automated regional health checks and failover routing
learningPoints: Managing eventual consistency in global data stores
Optimizing cold starts in Lambda@Edge environments
Global DNS strategy for multi-region architectures
Synchronizing state across distributed edge nodes

projects.title: Critical Infrastructure Security Vault
projects.summary: Construct a high-security vault for sensitive industrial blueprints using KMS Envelope Encryption and S3 Object Lock for immutability. Implement Amazon Macie to continuously scan for sensitive IP or PII within unstructured data, ensuring compliance with international industrial standards.
outcomes: Immutable document storage using S3 Object Lock (Compliance Mode)
Automated PII/IP detection reports via Amazon Macie
Hardware-backed encryption using AWS KMS CMKs
Granular IAM policies for cross-account vault access
learningPoints: Envelope encryption vs direct encryption performance
Configuring S3 Lifecycle policies with Object Lock
Macie classification job optimization for cost control
Audit logging and forensics for sensitive data access

projects.title: Factory Floor Event Mesh
projects.summary: Build a real-time event mesh to synchronize state across thousands of factory floor actuators using AppSync WSS subscriptions. Orchestrate complex event flows with EventBridge Pipes to filter and enrich telemetry before triggering reactive Lambda functions for immediate anomaly response.
outcomes: Real-time WebSocket synchronization for plant actuators
Point-to-point integration using EventBridge Pipes
Serverless event enrichment and transformation layer
Low-latency reactive microservices for plant alerts
learningPoints: AppSync GraphQL subscription scaling and filtering
EventBridge Pipes for direct service-to-service integration
Managing event ordering and deduplication in a mesh
Optimizing WebSocket connection longevity and heartbeats

projects.title: Automated Schematic & BOM Parser
projects.summary: Develop an intelligent ingestion engine for industrial PDF schematics and Bills of Materials (BOM) using Textract for OCR. Extract semantic entities with Bedrock Claude 3 and index the results in OpenSearch Vector engine for multi-modal similarity search across the spare parts inventory.
outcomes: High-accuracy OCR pipeline for technical schematics
Semantic entity extraction from complex BOM tables
Vector-based similarity search for industrial components
Automated inventory matching against parsed schematics
learningPoints: Handling complex table structures in Textract
Vector quantization and indexing in OpenSearch
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) for technical docs
Processing asynchronous Textract jobs at high volume

projects.title: Safety Protocol Vision Monitor
projects.summary: Implement a real-time safety monitoring system using Kinesis Video Streams to ingest live plant footage. Integrate Amazon Rekognition to detect PPE compliance (helmets, vests) and trigger immediate Lambda-driven alerts to site supervisors when violations occur.
outcomes: Live video ingestion pipeline for industrial sites
Real-time object and PPE detection with Rekognition
Automated safety violation alerting system
Secure storage and retrieval of safety incident footage
learningPoints: Kinesis Video Stream fragmentation and parsing
Custom Rekognition labels for specific industrial gear
Low-latency triggering of vision-based events
Privacy-preserving video processing techniques

projects.title: Technical Media Orchestration
projects.summary: Orchestrate a multi-lingual training video studio using AWS Step Functions to automate transcription, translation, and dubbing. Use Transcribe for technical jargon recognition, Translate for localization, and Polly for high-fidelity technical narration in 20+ languages.
outcomes: Automated dubbing and subtitling pipeline for technical training
Multi-lingual technical glossary support in Transcribe
High-fidelity AI-generated technical narration
Serverless orchestration of media processing workflows
learningPoints: Orchestrating long-running media jobs with Step Functions
Custom vocabulary and dictionary management in Transcribe
SSML optimization for Polly technical speech
Parallelizing translation workflows across global regions

projects.title: Digital Twin Asset Generator
projects.summary: Mass-generate high-fidelity 2D digital twin assets from CAD metadata using Bedrock Titan image models. Utilize S3 Batch Operations to trigger image generation for millions of components, employing Lambda Layers for heavy image processing dependencies.
outcomes: Automated generation of digital twin visual assets
Mass-processing pipeline for millions of S3 objects
Optimized Lambda Layers for image manipulation
Consistent visual asset catalog for industrial UIs
learningPoints: Prompt engineering for technical asset generation
S3 Batch Operations with Lambda manifest files
Managing large dependencies in Lambda Layers
Cost-optimized image generation strategies

projects.title: Global Compliance Localizer
projects.summary: Build a recursive localization engine to adapt safety protocols to regional industrial regulations using Bedrock. Use Step Functions to orchestrate cultural and legal adjustments, and SES for distributing certified safety manuals to regional plant managers.
outcomes: AI-driven regulatory adaptation of technical docs
Recursive Step Function workflows for complex logic
Verified email distribution of compliance reports
Regionalized safety protocol repository
learningPoints: Recursive workflow patterns in Step Functions
LLM-based regulatory analysis and adjustment
Email deliverability and reporting with SES
Contextual data injection for regional compliance

projects.title: Operational Command Toxicity Filter
projects.summary: Secure the plant's operational communication channels with a real-time toxicity filter using WAF custom rules for protocol protection. Integrate Bedrock over WebSockets (WSS) to analyze command intent and filter out unauthorized or harmful instructions with sub-second latency.
outcomes: Real-time filtering of operational command streams
WAF-based protection for internal plant APIs
Sub-second intent analysis via Bedrock WSS
Audit logs for unauthorized command attempts
learningPoints: WAF custom rules for API protocol protection
Streaming LLM responses for low-latency filtering
Managing WebSocket state and security in Lambda
Zero-trust communication patterns in industrial IoT

projects.title: Real-time Telemetry Analytics
projects.summary: Construct a high-throughput telemetry analytics pipeline using Kinesis Data Streams and Managed Flink for windowed aggregations. Index processed telemetry in OpenSearch for real-time visualization of plant efficiency and predictive failure heatmaps.
outcomes: High-throughput real-time stream processing architecture
Sliding-window analytics for sensor aggregations
Real-time plant efficiency heatmaps in OpenSearch
Automated anomaly detection on streaming data
learningPoints: Flink SQL for stream processing and windowing
Kinesis shard management and auto-scaling
OpenSearch indexing strategies for high-volume logs
Maintaining stateful computations in streaming apps

projects.title: Global Component Price Crawler
projects.summary: Develop a distributed crawler to monitor global raw material prices using ECS Fargate Spot for cost-effective compute. Orchestrate tasks via SQS with robust Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) handling and use DynamoDB TTL to automatically purge ephemeral price data.
outcomes: Cost-optimized distributed crawling architecture
Resilient message processing with SQS and DLQs
Automatic data lifecycle management with DynamoDB TTL
Real-time raw material price monitoring system
learningPoints: Managing Spot Instance interruptions in Fargate
Distributed task orchestration and idempotency
Optimizing DynamoDB costs with TTL and GSIs
Error handling and retry logic in distributed systems

projects.title: Emergency Alert Engine
projects.summary: Build a high-reliability emergency notification engine using SNS for instant mobile alerts and Pinpoint for complex multi-channel communication journeys. Utilize EventBridge Scheduler to manage periodic safety drills and automated system health checks.
outcomes: Multi-channel emergency alerting (SMS, Voice, Push)
Complex notification journeys for plant personnel
Scheduled safety drill orchestration
Real-time delivery analytics for critical alerts
learningPoints: SNS high-concurrency message delivery
Amazon Pinpoint user segmentation and journeys
EventBridge Scheduler for precision task triggering
Reliability and failover for critical messaging

projects.title: Industrial Data Lakehouse
projects.summary: Architect an industrial data lakehouse using AWS Glue for ETL and Athena for federated queries. Implement a Natural Language to SQL interface using Bedrock, allowing plant managers to query petabytes of historical telemetry using plain English.
outcomes: Unified data lake for historical telemetry and ERP data
NL-to-SQL interface for non-technical users
Automated data cataloging and schema evolution
Cost-optimized federated queries across S3 and RDS
learningPoints: Glue ETL jobs and data catalog management

projects.title: Autonomous Plant Architect
projects.summary: Create an agentic system that autonomously designs and optimizes plant layouts. Utilize Bedrock Agents to interpret requirements, and CodeBuild to trigger automated CAD rendering and simulation via GitHub APIs, iterating on design based on simulation feedback.
outcomes: Agent-driven autonomous plant design system
Automated CI/CD for hardware simulation code
Integration with GitHub API for design versioning
Closed-loop feedback for layout optimization

projects.title: Technical Manual Multi-modal RAG
projects.summary: Implement a multi-modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platform to query thousands of industrial manuals. Use Bedrock Titan Embeddings for vectorizing both text and diagrams, and OpenSearch Serverless for a low-maintenance, scalable vector store.
outcomes: Semantic search across technical text and imagery
Serverless vector database for low-overhead scaling
Integrated RAG pipeline for engineering queries
High-accuracy technical context retrieval
learningPoints: Multi-modal embedding strategies and alignment
OpenSearch Serverless collection management

projects.title: Spare Part Recommendation Engine
projects.summary: Build a predictive spare part recommendation engine using Amazon Personalize to anticipate component failures. Integrate Lambda hooks to inject real-time telemetry into the recommendation model, ensuring high relevance for maintenance crews.
outcomes: Predictive maintenance recommendation API
Real-time ingestion of telemetry into ML models
Personalized maintenance schedules for plant technicians
Automated spare part inventory forecasting

projects.title: Industrial Reasoning Agents
projects.summary: Deploy a swarm of reasoning agents to troubleshoot complex plant failures. Orchestrate multiple specialized agents using Bedrock Multi-agent orchestration and provide real-time feedback to engineers over WebSockets.
outcomes: Collaborative multi-agent troubleshooting system
Real-time reasoning logs over WebSocket streams
Automated failure root-cause analysis
Integrated action plans for maintenance repair

projects.title: SCADA SQL Workbench
projects.summary: Develop an optimized workbench for querying SCADA historical data. Use S3 SELECT for surgical data extraction and Bedrock to automatically optimize Athena queries based on data partitioning and access patterns.

AI-optimized Athena query performance
Real-time query optimization for engineer workflows

projects.title: Supply Chain Saga Orchestrator
projects.summary: Orchestrate complex supply chain transactions across multiple external vendors using the Saga pattern. Implement distributed transactions with Step Functions to handle stock reservation, payment, and shipping with full rollback capabilities.

projects.title: Microservices Plant Mesh
projects.summary: Architect a resilient service mesh for plant microservices using ECS Fargate and AWS App Mesh. Implement service discovery with CloudMap and deep observability using AWS X-Ray to trace requests across the global plant network.

Zero-trust mTLS communication within the mesh

projects.title: Global Disaster Recovery Failover
projects.summary: Design a survival-critical multi-region failover architecture for industrial control systems. Utilize Route 53 health checks, S3 Cross-Region Replication (CRR), and DynamoDB Global Tables to ensure plant operations continue during a regional AWS outage.

projects.summary: Codify entire plant infrastructures using AWS CDK with custom TypeScript constructs. Orchestrate deployments through CodePipeline to ensure consistent, repeatable environments across global manufacturing sites.
